title: subpilocereus repandus
intro: Subpilocereus repandus, also known as the 'Pitaya Blanca' or 'White Dragon Fruit', is a type of cactus plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and other antioxidants. The health benefits of Subpilocereus repandus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and juices that can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
